ThingDef.label: Family letter
ThingDef.description:
"A child leaves home young, returns old, His accent unchanged, though hair turns grey."

An aged bamboo slip, its inscriptions now faded. Some free cultivators, having drifted to the outer rim planets, found themselves unwelcomed by the locals. But do they still have a chance to regret?

This item is a trade good with no practical use, though certain merchant caravans may take interest in it.

ThingDef.label: Bloodstained wooden effigy
ThingDef.description:
A wooden figurine, stained with blood and worn smooth from years of touch. Few are born wicked; most who stray down the dark path have their own stories. Yet life is like a game of chess—once a piece is placed, there is no turning back.

To steady their wavering hearts, evil cultivators hold their own beliefs, with Thran Immortal being the most revered. Such wooden figurines serve as objects of their devotion.

This item is a trade good with no practical use, though certain merchant caravans may take interest in it.

ThingDef.label: Corroded medal
ThingDef.description: A small military medal, corroded beyond recognition, yet highly sought after by antique collectors. This medal appears to trace back to the distant era of the Founder's War, a time when cultivators had yet to call themselves Immortals and instead served as soldiers, following orders.\n\nThis item is a trade good with no practical use, though certain merchant caravans may take interest in it.

ThingDef.label: Shimmering spiritual crystal
ThingDef.description:
A small, perfectly cut Spiritual Crystal refracts dazzling light under illumination. The artisan who crafted it must have been incredibly patient, as Spiritual Crystals are fragile and prone to breaking with the slightest mistake, making them rare as decorative pieces. However, even when cut and polished, the crystal’s essence remains unchanged—it can still provide cultivators with a trace of Qi energy.

This item is a trade good with no practical use, though certain merchant caravans may take interest in it.

This crystal can not control the role of life.
